title: Toxicate
description: Toxicate | To describe the act of poisoning someone
body:
# POISON!
Poison your enemies! Poison your friends! Poison yourself!
## Simply pour your potions onto your food and your enemies are none the wiser
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PT61_lQFvEg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Simply by picking up a potion in your inventory and right clicking it onto a food item, you too can ~~harmlessly~~ prank your friends, or save yourself time by making all your food give you strength

# Potion Mixing!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6e7l-dwCe9Y" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Now you can mix together all your favorite potions... beware of the chance of side effects
